name: Aegis
description: Local privacy router for agentic AI. Classifies files via FunctionGemma (on-device), then routes to sanitization, passthrough, block, or escalation.

aegisEnabled.description: Enable Aegis FunctionGemma classification. When false, falls back to sanitize-everything.

aegisBridgeUrl.description: URL of the Aegis bridge server (aegis_bridge.py)

aegisBridgeTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for Aegis bridge requests in milliseconds

denyPathGlobs.description: Glob patterns for paths that are absolutely forbidden to access

allowedRoots.description: Root directories that are allowed to be accessed

sanitizeAlwaysGlobs.description: Glob patterns for files that should always be sanitized (PDFs, docs, etc.)

auditLogPath.description: Path to JSONL audit log file

llmProvider.description: LLM provider for DataGuard sanitization: 'ollama' for local, 'openrouter' for cloud

llmMode.description: Redaction mode: 'tool-calling' for surgical edits (recommended), 'prompt' for full rewrite

ollamaBaseUrl.description: Base URL for local Ollama instance (must be localhost)

ollamaModel.description: Ollama model to use for sanitization (e.g. gemma2, llama2, etc.)

ollamaTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for Ollama requests in milliseconds

openrouterModel.description: OpenRouter model to use (e.g. qwen/qwen3-coder, openai/gpt-4o-mini)

openrouterTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for OpenRouter requests in milliseconds
